mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_practice (student_id, course_id, course_name, questions, answers, score, total_score) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{questions}, #{answers}, #{score}, #{totalScore})
mapper.select: SELECT ap.*, s.real_name AS student_name FROM ai_practice ap LEFT JOIN student s ON ap.student_id = s.id WHERE ap.id = #{id}
SELECT ap.*, s.real_name AS student_name FROM ai_practice ap LEFT JOIN student s ON ap.student_id = s.id WHERE ap.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY ap.create_time DESC
SELECT ap.*, s.real_name AS student_name FROM ai_practice ap LEFT JOIN student s ON ap.student_id = s.id WHERE ap.student_id = #{studentId} AND ap.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY ap.create_time DESC
